name: Kahlua Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whip the Cool Whip and heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
2. Using a rubber spatula, stir in the cocoa powder, instant coffee, and sugar; blend well.
3. Add the Kahlua and stir thoroughly with the spatula.
4. Spoon the mixture into 6 to 8 dessert cups and chill in the refrigerator.
5. When ready to serve, dust the top of each serving with chocolate sprinkles and crown with a dollop of Cool Whip.
6. Serve with wafer cookies.
